24.reason: [The output format requires each integer separated by a space, but puts(Stack) prints characters without spaces between them. Also, the original reference program printed each digit followed by a space, which matches the required format.]

33.reason: [Storing digits as characters in a char array leads to incorrect output format when printed with puts(), which doesn't insert spaces between digits and prints raw characters. Should store integers and print with proper formatting.]
